title: cross_engine r2/r6/r8 deeper integration plan — 3 roadmap_engine dossier SHA anchors + 4 load-bearing invariant @M meta-axes import into hexa_sim atlas vocabulary
trigger: F126-F132 cross-engine integration covers tool/r4_replan.py (F128) + r4 manifest (F129) + m3 (F127) + m5 BNF (F130) + r10/m10 dossier (F131); r4 deeper plan (F168-F174) anchored 5 r4 ω-cycles + dossier + I1 geo-mean meta; r10 deeper plan (F175-F178) anchored 2 cross_engine audits + I1/I2 meta. r2 (Bayesian η Beta-Bernoulli) + r6 (bidirectional Dijkstra) + r8 (convergence certificate) dossiers remain unanchored. Same B+C pattern as r4_deeper / r10_deeper. m3 fixpoint named cluster mop-up — this is the roadmap_engine non-r4 axes pass.

r2_r6_r8_source_artifacts.role: r2 online Bayesian η dossier (220 lines, 9 sections — Beta-Bernoulli posterior + Thompson sampling + JSONL persistence + ±0.05 stationary falsifier + r12 halting acknowledgment + 130 LoC budget)

r6 reverse-path-synthesis dossier (281 lines, 8 sections — bidirectional Dijkstra/A* + Pohl 1971 termination + 5-cost-type admissibility table + meeting-in-the-middle proof + Brent ceiling caveat + 240 LoC budget)
r8 convergence certificate dossier (158 lines, 8 sections — JSON cert schema + Bellman lemma ledger + ε_0 ordinal anchor + Gödel 2nd / Löb disclaimer + diamond-DAG falsifier + 150 LoC budget)

subject_inventory.r2_r6_r8_omega_cycles_searched: NONE found — globbed design/roadmap_engine/ + design/ for *r2*omega* / *r6*omega* / *r8*omega* yields zero matches; only the 3 dossiers exist (vs r4 which has 6 ω-cycle witnesses). Honest reflection: r2/r6/r8 are design-stage axes without implementation cycles — SHA-anchor the dossiers only, defer ω-cycle anchoring until cycles materialize
r2_invariants_identified_from_dossier: I_R2_1 beta_posterior_stationary_convergence_within_05_50trials — falsifier (dossier §6 verbatim): on synthetic stationary env with true η=0.3, posterior mean must converge to within ±0.05 of 0.3 within 50 i.i.d. Bernoulli(0.3) trials; if not, axis falsified for stationary case. Load-bearing — Beta-Bernoulli posterior consistency theorem (Doob 1949) bound; numeric: variance ≈ 0.3·0.7/52 ≈ 0.004 → std ≈ 0.063 (tight but achievable at posterior-mean level).

I_R2_2 prior_decay_pseudocount_kappa_2 — dossier §2: when author supplies JSON eta=m, seed α0=1+κ·m, β0=1+κ·(1−m) with κ=2; authored hints decay quickly under real evidence. Load-bearing for r2 design intent (author guess = prior, not hard fact).

I_R2_3 r12_halting_undecidable_acknowledged_no_repeal — dossier §7: posterior gives finite-horizon credible interval, NOT proof that T* converges; even α=1000,β=1 leaves η=0 prior probability ≈ 1/(α+β+1) > 0; engine's --max-iter cap remains only finitary safeguard. Load-bearing meta-claim (parent ω-cycle r12 anchor preserved).
r6_invariants_identified_from_dossier: I_R6_1 pohl_termination_topF_plus_topB_geq_mu — dossier §2 step 3: bidirectional search terminates when topF + topB ≥ μ (best meeting cost); no unexplored path can beat μ under non-negative edge weights. Load-bearing correctness theorem (Pohl 1971); falsifier: seed-deterministic μ + meet point.

I_R6_2 admissibility_per_cost_type_table_5_rows — dossier §3: backward-cost b_back(S) admissible per cost type — build PROVED, exp PROVED-frozen-param, learn SKETCHED-fix-needed (must use c_eff = cost·(1−η)^k_max not k=0), boot SKETCHED, verify OPEN (gated on r14 K_target lower bound). Load-bearing — A* gain survives r17 NFL only via problem-specific h.

I_R6_3 bidir_median_ratio_below_07_5_dags — dossier §6 falsifier: median(nodes_expanded_bidir / nodes_expanded_fwd) < 0.70 over 5 random DAGs (depth 6, branch 3, ~700 nodes); fail → axis falsified, defer to Tier-2. Plus auxiliary: optimal cost equality bidir = forward A* within 1e-6.

I_R6_4 brent_ceiling_search_effort_not_wallclock — dossier §4 caveat: bidirectional reduces SEARCH EFFORT (nodes expanded), does NOT lower wall-clock T_∞; cannot beat critical path span. r15 Brent acknowledged inviolable.

I_R6_5 r17_nfl_escape_via_problem_specific_b_back — dossier §Anchors: backward Dijkstra from G yields b_back which is true min-remaining-cost on planner's own cost model → problem-specific by construction → escapes Wolpert-Macready 1997. Load-bearing existence justification.
r8_invariants_identified_from_dossier: I_R8_1 t_star_admissibility_upper_bound_geq_true — dossier §4 verbatim: T_star_upper_bound ≥ T*_true required; if cert reports < T*_true, bound INADMISSIBLE → axis falsified wholesale (NOT patched). Load-bearing falsifier on hand-crafted diamond DAG (costs [1,2,3,4], optimal=7).

I_R8_2 bellman_ledger_v_s_equals_b_a_plus_v_next — dossier §3 check 3: for each row in bellman_lemma.instance, V_S == b_a + V_next within float epsilon (1e-9); plus path sum T_star_upper_bound == Σ b_a; arithmetic-checkable from cert alone. Load-bearing object-level verifier guarantee.

I_R8_3 ordinal_anchor_external_epsilon0_gentzen_1936 — dossier §2 + §5: cert names external proof-theoretic ordinal ε_0 anchored to Gentzen 1936 'Die Widerspruchsfreiheit der reinen Zahlentheorie'; system='PA'; Gentzen-style escape from Gödel 2nd trap. Load-bearing — without external anchor, cert collapses to self-cert.

I_R8_4 godel_2nd_self_cert_disclaimer_verbatim — dossier §5: cert REJECTS internal self-consistency clause; mandatory self_cert_disclaimer field; verifier object-language vs soundness metalanguage split (Löb 1955 + Gödel 1931). Load-bearing honesty constraint — third-party checkability requires honest disclaimer.

I_R8_5 cycle_then_no_cert_emitted_explicit_refusal — dossier §4 second falsifier: deliberate cycle → assumptions.dag_acyclic = false → NO cert emitted, instead explicit refusal record. Falsifies any cert observed under cyclic input.

candidate_categorization_for_atlas.OPT_A_per_cost_type_field_S_entries: r6 5-cost-type admissibility rows (build/exp/learn/boot/verify) → @S structure entries. Verdict: REJECTED — duplicates dossier §3 table; field-level @S per cost type adds atlas noise without verifier leverage; falsifier I_R6_2 already captures the table claim as one @M (analog to r4 deeper rejecting OPT-A strategy fields).
candidate_categorization_for_atlas.OPT_B_invariant_M_meta_entries: r2/r6/r8 dossier load-bearing invariants → @M meta-axis entries analog to F132/F160/F174/F177/F178. Each invariant becomes one @M entry in NEW shard atlas.append.r2-r6-r8-deeper-2026-04-26.n6 with grep-based falsifier. Verdict: SELECTED for I_R2_1 (Beta posterior ±0.05 stationary convergence) + I_R6_2 (admissibility per cost type) + I_R8_1 (T* admissibility upper bound) + I_R8_3 (ε_0 external ordinal anchor). 4 @M total — 2 from r8 because r8 has TWO load-bearing claims (admissibility + Gentzen anchor) analogous to r10_deeper with self-cert + ordinal-separation pair.
candidate_categorization_for_atlas.OPT_C_omega_cycle_T_trace_entries: r2/r6/r8 ω-cycles → @T trace entries (verify SHA). Verdict: REDUCED — NO ω-cycles exist for r2/r6/r8 (only dossiers); 3 @T entries cover the 3 dossier files as design-trail anchors. Honest reflection: r2/r6/r8 are pre-implementation axes; deferred ω-cycle SHA anchoring until cycles ship.
candidate_categorization_for_atlas.chosen: B + C combination (matches r4_deeper / r10_deeper pattern) — 3 @T file-SHA entries (r2/r6/r8 dossiers, no ω-cycles yet) + 4 @M meta-axes (I_R2_1 + I_R6_2 + I_R8_1 + I_R8_3, the 4 load-bearing falsifier-grade invariants). Total 7 atlas entries (matches F168-F174 r4 deeper cadence). Other invariants (I_R2_2/3, I_R6_1/3/4/5, I_R8_2/4/5) deferred to Tier-2 — they require runtime telemetry (posterior JSONL, bidir search profile, cert JSONL) not yet on disk; SHA-only anchoring premature without code emission cycles.
